title: cardamine glacialis proles subcarnosa
intro: Cardamine glacialis proles subcarnosa, commonly known as Alpine Bittercress, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of Alpine Bittercress include pain relief, wound healing, and immune system support, likely due to its bioactive constituents such as glucosinolates, alkaloids, and flavonoids. However, I couldn't find specific information on the therapeutic actions and health benefits of this plant, suggesting it may not be as well-studied as other species within the same family.
